section_name: Determination Whether Vehicle Subject to Registration or Eligible for Distinguishing License Plate
chapter_title: Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
text:
(a) The department may establish criteria to determine whether oil well servicing, oil well clean out, or oil well drilling machinery or equipment is subject to registration under Chapter 502 (Registration of Vehicles) or eligible for the distinguishing license plate provided by Section 502.146 (Certain Farm Vehicles and Drilling and Construction Equipment) .

(b) Notwithstanding Subsection (a), a vehicle authorized by the department before August 22, 1963, to operate without registration under Chapter 502 (Registration of Vehicles) may not be required to register under that chapter.

(c) In this section, “oil well servicing, oil well clean out, or oil well drilling machinery or equipment” means a vehicle constructed as a machine used solely for servicing, cleaning out, or drilling an oil well and consisting in general of a mast, an engine for power, a draw works, and a chassis permanently constructed or assembled for one or more of those purposes.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 623. Permits for Oversize or Overweight Vehicles
##### § 623.149 — Determination Whether Vehicle Subject to Registration or Eligible for Distinguishing License Plate

(a) The department may establish criteria to determine whether oil well servicing, oil well clean out, or oil well drilling machinery or equipment is subject to registration under Chapter 502 (Registration of Vehicles) or eligible for the distinguishing license plate provided by Section 502.146 (Certain Farm Vehicles and Drilling and Construction Equipment) .

(b) Notwithstanding Subsection (a), a vehicle authorized by the department before August 22, 1963, to operate without registration under Chapter 502 (Registration of Vehicles) may not be required to register under that chapter.

(c) In this section, “oil well servicing, oil well clean out, or oil well drilling machinery or equipment” means a vehicle constructed as a machine used solely for servicing, cleaning out, or drilling an oil well and consisting in general of a mast, an engine for power, a draw works, and a chassis permanently constructed or assembled for one or more of those purposes.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1135 (H.B.2741), Sec. 116, eff. September 1, 2013.*

subsections.text: In this section, “oil well servicing, oil well clean out, or oil well drilling machinery or equipment” means a vehicle constructed as a machine used solely for servicing, cleaning out, or drilling an oil well and consisting in general of a mast, an engine for power, a draw works, and a chassis permanently constructed or assembled for one or more of those purposes.
